column1: Subject: Education, Language Spoken and Literacy
Topic: Schools, Facilities, Students and Education Officers
Table Title: Number Of Students By School Level, Planning Region And Sex, Annual

1. Include Government, Government-aided, Independent, Specialised Independent and Specialised schools.  2. Mixed Level schools comprise primary & secondary schools (P1-S4/5) and secondary & junior college schools (S1-JC2).  Mixed Level schools are classified by type according to their secondary sections.  3. Data are based on the number of students attending schools within each planning region.
Mixed Level schools comprise Primary & Secondary schools and Secondary & Junior College schools.
Planning Regions refer to areas demarcated in the Urban Redevelopment Authority's Master Plan 2014 for Year 2019 and Master Plan 2019 for Year 2020-2025.
na   not available or not applicable
-     nil or negligible or not significant
Numbers may not add up to the totals due to rounding.
Data are the latest available at the time of access or download. Some statistics, particularly those for the most recent time periods, are provisional and may be subject to revision at a later date.
Values are shown in Singapore dollars (unless otherwise specified).
